plan.title: Digital Special Calculator
plan.overview: Create a Digital Special calculator module in Python supporting three core operations: sum, product, and div.
requirements: Support sum, product, and div for numeric inputs (integers and floats)
Properly handle edge cases, specifically division by zero
Use robust Python 3 type hints for all parameters and return types
Adhere to ruff formatting, Google-style docstrings, and strict mypy typing
Accompanied by unit tests providing high coverage (80%+) following pytest project conventions

implementation_steps.title: Implement Core Mathematical Logic
actions: Implement add(a: int | float, b: int | float) -> int | float
Implement multiply(a: int | float, b: int | float) -> int | float
Implement divide(a: int | float, b: int | float) -> float

implementation_steps.title: Implement Calculator Interface
actions: Create a SpecialCalculator class wrapping core math operations
Expose sum, product, and div methods

implementation_steps.title: Module Initialization
actions: Define __all__ to expose SpecialCalculator and custom exceptions
